---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working right
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
---

**Hardware:**
- Device: [T-Deck / T-Deck Plus]
- Firmware version: [e.g. v0.1.0 or commit hash]

**Describe the bug:**
A clear description of what went wrong.

**Steps to reproduce:**
1. Flash firmware version X
2. Navigate to...
3. Observe...

**Expected behavior:**
What you expected to happen.

**Actual behavior:**
What actually happened.

**Logs or screenshots:**
If applicable, paste serial output or attach a photo of the screen.

**Additional context:**
Any other info (board revision, SD card present, GPS module, etc.)
